mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mbr_acct ( lgn_id, pwd, email, role, created_by ) VALUES ( #{lgnId}, #{pwd}, #{email}, #{role}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT mbr_acct_idx AS idx, mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, lgn_id, pwd, email, role, lgn_fail_cnt, lck_yn, lck_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE lgn_id = #{lgnId} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT mbr_acct_idx AS idx, mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, lgn_id, pwd, email, role, lgn_fail_cnt, lck_yn, lck_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT mbr_acct_idx AS idx, mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, lgn_id, pwd, email, role, lgn_fail_cnt, lck_yn, lck_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET email = #{email}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET del_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lgn_fail_cnt = lgn_fail_cnt + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lck_yn = TRUE, lck_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lgn_fail_cnt = 0, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
